display.purpose: Hero headlines and expressive landing sections.

body.purpose: Browsing, booking, messaging, and management flows.

label.purpose: Chips, nav labels, status markers, and compact CTAs.

shadows.name: raised-surface
shadows.purpose: Tighter elevated controls and hover states.

motion.name: motion-fast
motion.purpose: Tap, hover, and small state changes.

motion.name: motion-slow
motion.purpose: Decorative landing motion and staggered reveal.

narrative.componentPhilosophy: Friendly beauty-native controls with enough firmness for pricing and booking confidence.
narrative.elevationPhilosophy: Ambient lift, not hard material depth.
dos: Keep app workflows grounded in blush neutrals, dark ink text, and pink emphasis.
Use serif display typography only where brand persuasion matters.
Treat landing color fields as expressive storytelling surfaces, not defaults for dense screens.
donts: Do not drift into generic enterprise dashboard styling.
Do not use dark cyberpunk AI gloss, neon gradients, or glass-heavy futurism.
Do not over-cute the product at the cost of scheduling and pricing trust.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action button for booking and confirm flows.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; min-height:44px; padding:0 16px; border:none; border-radius:8px; background:#ec5d7b; color:#ffffff; font:700 16px/1 Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; transition:background-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 0.61, 0.36, 1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 0.61, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform:translateY(-1px); background:#c73963; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Selection chip for style filters and compact browse controls.
components.css: .ds-chip { min-height:36px; padding:0 14px; border:1px solid rgba(46, 31, 43, 0.08); border-radius:999px; background:#ffffff; color:#6c5a65; font:600 14px/1 Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-chip-selected { background:#ffe4eb; color:#c73963; border-color:rgba(199, 57, 99, 0.2); }

components.name: Soft Card
components.description: Default app container for content blocks, summaries, and panels.
components.html:
Quote estimate

AI-generated price and duration based on selected design.
components.css: .ds-card { padding:16px; border:1px solid rgba(46, 31, 43, 0.08); border-radius:8px; background:#ffffff; color:#24181f; box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(74, 39, 55, 0.08); } .ds-card h3 { margin:0 0 8px; font:700 18px/1.25 Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-card p { margin:0; color:#6c5a65; font:400 16px/1.5 Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; }

components.name: Top Bar
components.description: Sticky mobile app header with soft blur and compact utility actions.
components.html:
Nailed-itM

Your daily schedule.
components.css: .ds-top-bar { padding:15px 16px 14px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(46, 31, 43, 0.08); background:rgba(255, 248, 247, 0.92); backdrop-filter:blur(18px); } .ds-top-row { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:12px; } .ds-top-brand { color:#24181f; font:800 16px/1.2 Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; text-decoration:none; } .ds-top-subtitle { margin:4px 0 0; color:#6c5a65; font:400 13px/1.45 Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-top-avatar { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:32px; height:32px; border-radius:999px; background:#ffe4eb; color:#c73963; font:700 14px/1 Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; }

components.name: Landing Feature Pill
components.description: Expressive landing selector for feature storytelling modules.
components.css: .ds-feature-pill { min-height:62px; min-width:224px; padding:12px 22px; border:none; border-radius:999px; background:#a8d8ea; color:#576a8f; font:800 clamp(1rem, 1.4vw, 1.35rem)/1 'Source Han Serif SC', 'Songti SC', 'STSong', serif; transition:transform 180ms ease, filter 180ms ease; } .ds-feature-pill:hover { transform:translateY(-1px); }
